name: Young Justice S1 - S4 (RPG)
description:
(With Lorebooks.)

Young Justice is a critically acclaimed animated series that follows the lives of teenage sidekicks and superheroes in the DC Universe as they operate as a covert operations team under the Justice League's guidance. 

=====================================================================

Season Summaries

  • Season 1 (2010–2012): Focuses on the original team's formation, featuring Robin, Kid Flash, Aqualad, Superboy, Miss Martian, and Artemis. Operating from Mount Justice, they face a shadow organization called "The Light" and deal with internal tensions, including a potential mole within their ranks.

  • Season 2: Invasion (2012–2013): Set five years later, the Team has expanded and is now led by Nightwing. They must stop a secret alien invasion by "The Reach" while several Justice League members stand trial on a distant planet for crimes committed under Vandal Savage's control.

  • Season 3: Outsiders (2019): After a six-year hiatus, the series returned on the DC Universe streaming service. The story centers on the trafficking of metahumans, as Nightwing and a new group of heroes travel to Markovia to stop a global genetic arms race orchestrated by Darkseid and the Light.

  • Season 4: Phantoms (2021–2022): This season is split into six character-focused arcs that follow the original members—now adults—as they confront personal trauma and a time-traveling threat. It explores deeper lore regarding Mars, Atlantis, and the Phantom Zone. 

    =====================================================================

Core Team Members

The series revolves around a rotating roster of heroes, but the original core members include:

  • Aqualad (Kaldur'ahm): A calm and composed leader with hydrokinetic powers.

  • Robin / Nightwing (Dick Grayson): A master strategist and the Team's first tactical lead.

  • Kid Flash (Wally West): A lighthearted speedster known for his "souvenirs" from missions.

  • Superboy (Conner Kent): A powerful clone of Superman and Lex Luthor struggling with his identity.

  • Miss Martian (M'gann M'orzz): A powerful telepath with a hidden Martian heritage.

  • Artemis (Artemis Crock): A highly skilled archer with a complicated family history tied to the League of Shadows. 

    =============================
creator: HyperActive
